projects.name: Books |2| Shelf
projects.subtitle: A Digital Bookshelf | With Google Books API
projects.description: Created a digital Bookshelf (SPA) app with real-time book search and user authentication. Features integration with Google Books API for comprehensive book data, Firebase for authentication and database management, and a clean, intuitive interface for managing personal book collections.
projects.challenge: Build a seamless single-page application that handles real-time book searches, user authentication, and persistent data storage while maintaining excellent performance.
projects.solution: Developed using React and Vite for fast build times, integrated Firebase for backend services including Auth and Firestore database, connected Google Books API for extensive book data, and styled with Tailwind CSS for a modern, responsive design.
impact: Real-time book search with Google Books API integration
Secure user authentication with Firebase Auth
Cloud-based data storage with Firestore database
highlights: Google Books API integration for book data
Deployed on Vercel with continuous integration

projects.name: Portfolio
projects.subtitle: Current Personal Domain
projects.description: Built a responsive Portfolio first in Framer (No-Code Designing) and then developed as SPA (Single Page Application) using React, Vite and Tailwind CSS. Features comprehensive skills & projects showcase with integrated contact functionality. Published on both Framer and Vercel for maximum reach.
projects.challenge: Design and develop a modern, performant portfolio that effectively showcases work while being easy to update and maintain across multiple platforms.
projects.solution: Started with Framer for rapid prototyping and design iterations, then translated the design into a custom React application with Vite for optimal performance, styled with Tailwind CSS for a polished, responsive interface.
impact: Dual deployment on Framer and Vercel platforms
Single Page Application for seamless navigation
Integrated contact system for client inquiries
Comprehensive showcase of skills and projects

projects.name: NIRVAN | First Project
projects.subtitle: An Ancient Peace To The Modern World
projects.description: Crafted a beautiful High Fidelity Figma prototype (30+ screens) with comprehensive Design System, Reusable Components and Responsive Layout, then implemented from Figma to Code ensuring pixel-perfect UI. Built as a Mobile-First responsive website using HTML, CSS, JavaScript and JSON APIs with complete focus on user experience and accessibility.
projects.challenge: Design and develop a comprehensive wellness brand website that balances aesthetic beauty with functionality, ensuring pixel-perfect implementation from design to code while maintaining mobile-first responsiveness.
projects.solution: Created an extensive Figma prototype with complete design system including reusable components, then meticulously translated the design into clean, semantic HTML/CSS/JavaScript code with JSON API integration for dynamic content.
impact: 30+ high-fidelity Figma screens with design system
Complete UX case study published on Behance
highlights: Published UX case study on Behance
